---
name: Add entry
about: Suggest a new entry for the list
title: 'Add [Name]'
labels: addition
assignees: ''
---

**Name and URL**

**Proposed section**

**Description (≤ 20 words, capital first letter, ends with a period)**

**Checklist**

- [ ] The link resolves and the project is real.
- [ ] The project has meaningful activity in the last 12 months (or is foundational/canonical).
- [ ] The project has a genuine multi-agent coordination dimension, not just "uses Claude".
- [ ] The project is not already covered by an entry in the list.
- [ ] The project has 50+ GitHub stars, or is uniquely valuable and verified active.
- [ ] The description is objective, ≤ 20 words, ends with a period, and uses no marketing language.
- [ ] I have read [contributing.md](../contributing.md).
